name: Boston Chicken Cranberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: Orange Marmalade (10 ounces) from Smucker's Simply Fruit
Fresh cranberries (2 cups), halved horizontally (2 to 3 per cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, over medium-to-low heat, stir together the jellied cranberry sauce, marmalade, and ginger until melted, about 6-8 minutes.
2. Add the sliced fresh cranberries, keeping the sauce on low heat. Stir often.
3. Continue cooking and stirring until the cranberries are no longer white and taste tender to the bite (not soft, but not too crisp).
4. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
5. Allow the mixture to cool to lukewarm, then refrigerate, covered, for up to 1 week.
6. The sauce can also be frozen for use within 4 months.
